name: workflow-tools
description: Reusable workflow agents for command pipelines (test baseline, risk-weighted planner, Opus code review)

agents.name: test-baseline
agents.description: Run the full test suite and return structured results for regression comparison. Use before making changes to capture a baseline.

agents.name: risk-planner
agents.description: Risk-weighted planner for SIGNIFICANT / HIGH-RISK tasks. Returns a structured plan with an explicit risks section. Uses Claude Opus. Do NOT use for SIMPLE / MODERATE tasks.

agents.name: code-review
agents.description: Post-implementation code review for SIGNIFICANT / HIGH-RISK tasks. Checks correctness, security, architecture, edge cases, migration, dependencies, tests, rollback. Returns PASS / PASS WITH RECOMMENDATIONS / BLOCK and gates the test run. Uses Claude Opus.
